title: arabis mollis subsp. mollis
intro: Arabis mollis subsp. mollis, also known as sweet alyssum, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Brassicaceae family, characterized by its small white flowers and delicate, fragrant leaves. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to soothe and calm digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The plant is said to offer various health benefits, such as alleviating symptoms of anxiety and insomnia, promoting relaxation, and supporting immune function. Arabis mollis subsp. mollis is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are believed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
